sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂמאל

Transliteration: śâma'l

Phonetic: saw-mal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to take the left, go to the left
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to go to the left
      2. to turn (aside) to the left (figuratively)
      3. to use the left hand

Origin: a primitive root [denom from H8040]

TWOT entry: 2267

Part(s) of speech: Verb
